## GENERAL INSTRUCTIONS

### Keeping This Updated

Run `/setup-agent` periodically to re-scan codebase:
- **First setup**: Answer 1-2 questions, add more as you work
- **Monthly**: Re-scan to auto-detect code changes + refresh patterns
- **After major changes**: Framework upgrade, new domain, new integrations

Example: `/setup-agent Update: switched to TypeScript`

See `.github/copilot-instructions.agent.md` for full upgrade cycle guidance.
